themeName: Egyptian Ministry of Education Official Palette

primary.description: Deep Navy Blue - Dominates navigation headers, sidebars, and primary portal containers to establish authority.

accent.description: State Gold - Extracted directly from the Egyptian Eagle Crest. Used for active state borders, focus indicators, and key action buttons.

background.description: Off-White & Light Grays - Clean base scales that ensure forms remain highly readable and look professional without causing eye strain.

text.description: Contrast Slate - High-contrast text values ensuring readability guidelines match official government accessibility frameworks.

status.description: System state colors for alerts, log trackers, error handlers, or application status flows.

uiPreferences.notes: Official MOE portals keep borders highly structured and square (md rounding at most) to maintain a rigid, official organizational appearance.
